title: pomaderris subplicata
intro: Pomaderris subplicata, also known as the spreading pomaderris, is a shrub native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pomaderris subplicata include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to protect against infections and promote wound healing. The herbal preparation of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, or used as a topical cream or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
